articles.title: CSL Restructure And Seqirus Split Reset Expectations After Share Price Slide
articles.summary: CSL (ASX:CSL) has outlined a restructuring plan that includes separating its Seqirus influenza vaccine business into a standalone entity. The company is also planning workforce reductions and the closure of selected plasma collection centres. Management has linked these steps to prolonged margin pressures and operational challenges across parts of the business.
